home.philosophyTitle: Are You Ready to See the Truth?
home.philosophySubtitle: A brief look at the book's philosophy.
home.thoughtsSubtitle: Short notes and in-depth analysis on human behavior, relationships, and the unseen sides of life.
home.heroSubtitle: Are you ready to drop the masks around you and face your shattering reality? Leave aside the sugar-coated lies you've been sold for years. This book is a manifesto of psychological awakening that will fundamentally change your relationships, your mental boundaries, and the way you perceive life.

about.subtitle: Author, Influencer & Consultant
about.paragraph1: I won't sell you academic theories or memorized personal development nonsense. I've been through the darkest, hardest-to-face parts of life. I know the pain I felt when I faced my own masks and the indescribable freedom that followed. That's why I only write the truths I've lived, seen, and proven.
about.paragraph2: My visual impairment taught me to read the world not with my eyes, but with my intuition. I started to hear the masks people wear, the fears they hide, and the lies they tell themselves. This book is a manifesto of those silent screams and my own awakening.
about.paragraph3: My goal is not to comfort you. My goal is to introduce you to that truth you've been running from for years. Because I know; a person can only truly be enlightened when they face their own darkness.
about.section1P1: I am İshak. I was born in 1995 in Yüksekova, Hakkâri, in the easternmost part of Turkey. I was diagnosed with retinal detachment at a young age. My eyes covered me in darkness, not light. But walking in the dark sharpens one's intuition.
about.section1P2: My visual impairment gave me a binoculars, not a wall. I looked inside people with these binoculars. I read guilt in their tone of voice, I heard screams in their silence.
about.section2P1: You, who are skimming these lines... Maybe you are looking to get lost in the warm embrace of a story, maybe the sweet ache of nostalgia, maybe the safe steps of a guide.
about.section2P2: But let me tell you upfront: This book is not a port where you will sigh between the lines. This is a storm. A mirror. A slap. And yes, a reckoning. It is the very act of confronting oneself, society, imposed masks, and silenced truths.
about.bookCoverAlt: Glasses That Show You Naked Book Cover Representative Image
about.socialMediaDesc: I produce active content on platforms like YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok. I reached large audiences with a transformation video I published in 2021, and this was a turning point in my career. Today, I continue my work as a social media expert and influencer.
about.versatileDesc: Although I grew up in a village, my curiosity about technology strongly connected me with the modern world. I gained a broad vision by operating in traditional areas such as farming and trade, as well as corporate sectors like operator dealerships and banking.
about.psychologyDesc: With the importance I attach to personal development, I continue to receive training in the fields of psychiatry, family counseling, and life coaching. I constantly strengthen my emotional intelligence and leadership qualities.
about.financeDesc: I expand my knowledge and skills by taking financial training. I argue that trade is not just about numbers, but also a philosophy of life.
about.globalVisionDesc: I aim to take part in international projects by taking training in English and French. I aim to reach audiences globally with the books I write.
about.consultingDesc: Would you like professional support in family counseling, life coaching, social media strategies, or your personal development journey? I would be happy to share my knowledge and experience with you.

book.description: Everyone has a story, but very few can truly read their own story. This book was written for you to meet that stranger you see when you look in the mirror. Are you ready to take off your masks, face your deepest fears, and taste true freedom?
book.warning: Warning: This book contains uncomfortable truths. Only those who are truly ready for change should read it.

readPreview.ctaDesc: This was just the beginning. If you've read this far and the discomfort you feel is familiar, there's no turning back now. Are you ready to take off your mask?
readPreview.orderAndRead: Order Now and Read It All

defaultContent.title1: Introduction: Before Putting on the Glasses
defaultContent.p1: Everyone has a story, but very few can truly read their own story. Most of us are busy playing the roles assigned to us in scripts written by others. Is the face we see when we look in the mirror really ours, or is it a mask shaped by society, our family, our past traumas?
defaultContent.p2: "Glasses That Show You Naked" is a metaphor. When you put on these glasses, you will start to see not people's clothes, but the nakedness in their souls, the fears they hide, their need for approval, and their deepest desires. But more importantly, when you look in the mirror, you will face your own nakedness.
defaultContent.p3: Why do we constantly make the same mistakes in our relationships? Why are we drawn to people who don't love us, and push away those who truly love us? Why do we sometimes sabotage our own potential in business life?
defaultContent.title2: Chapter One: The Fall of Masks
defaultContent.p4: Childhood is the period when the first mask given to us is put on. "Be a good child", "Don't cry", "Look strong"... These simple commands become the cornerstones of our personality over time. However, these stones are actually the walls of a dungeon where we imprison our own essence.
defaultContent.p5: In this book, we will tear down those walls one by one. It won't be easy. Facing your own darkness is sometimes painful. But remember, where the wound is, that's where the light enters.
